full_name: Transparent Reporting of a multivariable prediction model for Individual Prognosis Or Diagnosis + AI Extension

items.description: Identify the study as developing and/or validating a multivariable prediction model, the target population, and the outcome to be predicted
Provide an informative summary including objectives, study design, setting, participants, sample size, predictors, outcome, statistical analysis, results, and conclusions
Explain the medical context and rationale for developing or validating the model, including references to existing models
Describe the study design or source of data, separately for development and validation datasets
Specify key study dates, including start and end of accrual, and if applicable, follow-up
Specify key elements of the study setting, locations, and relevant dates
Describe eligibility criteria, treatment, and data sources
Clearly define the outcome predicted by the model, including how and when assessed
Describe the AI/ML model architecture, hyperparameters, and training procedure
Describe data preprocessing, feature engineering, and augmentation
Report hardware and software used for model development and evaluation
Describe any human-AI interaction in the prediction pipeline
Report model explainability methods used, if any

note: This is an abbreviated checklist. See tripod-statement.org for the complete 27-item checklist.
